author: anon-581fd578
content: Plan: Elements are all piled at (0,0). Need to: (1) Research how Iced, Druid/Xilem, and Dioxus wire layout positions into rendering, (2) Trace our pipeline to find where positions get lost — likely in generate_commands which maps layout NodeId to render NodeId, or in how text glyph positions are computed relative to their parent.
